seoTitle: Carlingford vs Carnes Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carlingford and Carnes Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Carlingford vs Carnes Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carlingford and Carnes Hill.
heading: Carlingford vs Carnes Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carlingford, New South Wales and Carnes Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carnes Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Carlingford (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carlingford or Carnes Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carlingford has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Carnes Hill scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carlingford scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Carnes Hill scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carlingford or Carnes Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carnes Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
